# Quality Checklist: Validate and Deduplicate Ingested Data

**Purpose**: Lightweight author checklist for reviewing security, data, and API requirements quality before implementation
**Created**: 2026-03-12
**Feature**: [spec.md](/root/311-forecast-system/specs/002-validate-deduplicate-data/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [X] CHK001 Are security requirements defined for all operational query surfaces that expose approval or processing outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013]
- [X] CHK002 Are data-lineage requirements specified from ingested dataset through cleaned approved dataset without leaving ownership or handoff gaps? [Completeness, Spec §FR-007, Plan §Phase 1 Design Summary]
- [X] CHK003 Are API-visible requirements defined for each operational status surface mentioned in the plan and contracts? [Completeness, Plan §Implementation Steps, contracts/validation-api.yaml]
- [X] CHK004 Does the spec define what information must be available to operational users for review-needed, rejected, failed, and approved outcomes? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-013]

## Requirement Clarity

- [X] CHK005 Is "required structure, formats, and value types" specific enough to derive unambiguous validation rules, or do the requirements need a clearer rule taxonomy? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [X] CHK006 Is "non-conflicting values" defined clearly enough to determine when duplicate consolidation is allowed versus blocked? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-005a]
- [X] CHK007 Is the distinction between "rejected," "failed," and "review-needed" outcomes defined with clear decision boundaries? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-014]
- [X] CHK008 Is the meaning of "currently approved dataset version" precise enough to avoid confusion with UC-01 current-dataset terminology? [Clarity, Spec §FR-013, data-model.md]

## Requirement Consistency

- [X] CHK009 Do the duplicate-threshold requirements align consistently between the general threshold statement and the percentage-based clarification? [Consistency, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011]
- [X] CHK010 Are status terms used consistently across the spec, plan, data model, and contract (`approved`, `rejected`, `failed`, `review_needed`)? [Consistency, Spec §FR-009, plan.md, data-model.md, contracts/validation-api.yaml]
- [X] CHK011 Are approval-marker requirements consistent between the spec and the reused UC-01 data lineage described in the plan and data model? [Consistency, Spec §FR-006, Spec §FR-008, data-model.md]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [X] CHK012 Can each success criterion be objectively verified from written requirements without inventing extra operational assumptions? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-005]
- [X] CHK013 Are timing expectations for approval availability and operator visibility tied clearly enough to the relevant flows and actors? [Clarity, Spec §SC-003, Spec §SC-004]

## Scenario Coverage

- [X] CHK014 Are requirements defined for all major scenario classes: successful approval, schema rejection, duplicate-analysis failure, storage failure, and review-needed hold? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-014]
- [X] CHK015 Does the spec define API-facing requirements for how operators distinguish current approved state from in-progress or blocked candidate state? [Coverage, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-013, contracts/validation-api.yaml]
- [X] CHK016 Are alternate and exception flows aligned between the feature spec and the acceptance-test intent captured in the plan summary? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Plan §Implementation Steps]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [X] CHK017 Are zero-duplicate datasets, high-volume low-percentage duplicate datasets, and unresolved duplicate-processing failures all addressed in requirements? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [X] CHK018 Does the spec define what happens when validation completes but status details cannot be stored or exposed through the expected operational surfaces? [Gap]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [X] CHK019 Are security requirements defined for protecting dataset-status and review-needed information from unauthorized access, not just for identifying authorized roles? [Security, Spec §FR-013]
- [X] CHK020 Are data-protection requirements specified for validation issues, duplicate summaries, and review-needed records so sensitive source content is not exposed? [Security, Gap]
- [X] CHK021 Are API contract quality requirements defined for missing-resource, unauthorized, and invalid-query scenarios on operational status surfaces? [API, Gap]
- [X] CHK022 Are observability requirements specific enough to distinguish diagnosable outcome details from implementation-specific logging choices? [Clarity, Plan §Logging and observability]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [X] CHK023 Are dependencies on UC-01 entities and lifecycle rules documented clearly enough to prevent conflicting interpretations of dataset versioning? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions, data-model.md]
- [X] CHK024 Are externally configured validation rules, duplicate-identification rules, and threshold assumptions defined with enough precision to know what must exist before UC-02 can work? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [X] CHK025 Is the coexistence of `FR-010` and `FR-011` still intentional, or do those requirements create redundant threshold language that should be consolidated? [Conflict, Spec §FR-010, Spec §FR-011]
- [X] CHK026 Is there any unresolved ambiguity about whether the approved dataset marker points to the ingested dataset version or the cleaned dataset version after UC-02 completes? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-007, data-model.md]

## Notes

- This is a requirements-quality checklist, not an implementation test plan.
- Items are intentionally lightweight for author-side review before task breakdown.
